job_summary: A Regulatory Affairs Specialist ensures that clinical trials meet all regulatory requirements for approval, conduct, and reporting across different regions.
key_responsibilities: Prepare and submit regulatory documents (IND, NDA, CTA, etc.)
Ensure compliance with local and global regulations
Interpret regulatory guidelines and implement changes
Support clinical teams in maintaining compliance
work_environment: Pharma companies, CROs, regulatory consulting firms
career_path: Regulatory Specialist → Regulatory Manager → Director of Regulatory Affairs
skills_required: ensure compliance with local and global regulations
prepare and submit regulatory documents (ind, nda, cta, etc.)
support clinical teams in maintaining compliance
